summary: Account & Billing Hub testing complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All key components render correctly including Surfer Status toggle, Plan Management with 3 tiers, Grom Management for Parents, and Active Surfer Mode toggle.
critical_code_review_comments: AccountBillingHub component correctly renders in Settings page
Surfer Status toggle correctly disabled for Pro-verified users (kelly@surf.com)
available_tiers correctly returns tier_1, tier_2, tier_3 with proper pricing
linked_groms array correctly populated for Grom Parent users
Stripe checkout uses custom domain (checkout.raw.surf) - working correctly
Toggle status endpoint correctly changes elite_tier between null and 'competitive'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Account & Billing Hub components render correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Account & Billing Hub fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/subscriptions/account-billing/{user_id}, /api/subscriptions/toggle-status/{user_id}, /api/subscriptions/upgrade-tier/{user_id}, /api/subscriptions/grom-tier/{parent_id}, /api/subscriptions/apply-pro/{user_id}. Stripe checkout uses custom domain checkout.raw.surf.

P0_account_billing_endpoint.details: GET /api/subscriptions/account-billing/{user_id} returns available_tiers (tier_1, tier_2, tier_3), current_status, linked_groms for parents

P0_toggle_status_endpoint.details: POST /api/subscriptions/toggle-status/{user_id} successfully toggles between regular and competitive status
P0_toggle_status_endpoint.test_evidence: Toggle changes elite_tier field, returns new_status and role

P1_upgrade_tier_endpoint.details: POST /api/subscriptions/upgrade-tier/{user_id} initiates Stripe checkout for paid tiers, instant switch for free tier
P1_upgrade_tier_endpoint.test_evidence: Free tier returns checkout_url=null, paid tiers return Stripe checkout URL

P1_grom_tier_management.details: POST /api/subscriptions/grom-tier/{parent_id} allows Grom Parents to manage linked Groms' subscriptions

P1_frontend_account_billing_hub.details: AccountBillingHub component renders correctly with Surfer Status, Your Plan, and Grom Management sections
P1_frontend_account_billing_hub.test_evidence: Screenshots show all sections rendering, data-testid elements found

P2_apply_pro_endpoint.details: POST /api/subscriptions/apply-pro/{user_id} sets pending Pro status for Comp Surfers
P2_apply_pro_endpoint.test_evidence: Returns status='pending', Grom Parents correctly forbidden

mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: Uses test mode keys - checkout URLs are real Stripe test sessions
